_doc: Model-swap eval matrix. ONE role varied per cell (isolate effects). The JUDGE is held FIXED at baseline across every cell (the measuring instrument) — a cell may NOT override judge_* (the runner rejects it). 'optional' cells run only with --include-optional. RUN is owner-token-gated; the runner only BUILDS the plan unless --execute is passed.

tolerance._note: no-regression tolerance vs baseline (delta >= -tol). 0.0 = strict; judge_temperature is 0.0 so judge variance is low. The owner may raise this to absorb residual judge nondeterminism.

rates_usd_per_mtok._note: PLACEHOLDER — the owner MUST set published USD-per-1M-token rates ({in, out}) for every cell model BEFORE the live run. Until set, the runner emits est_cost_per_turn=null + rates_missing[] (token counts are still reported, rate-agnostic). NEVER ship invented prices.
